chrome.name: MindReply - Pressure Relief
chrome.short_description: Get one clear next move from any stuck message, page, or follow-up
chrome.full_description:
MindReply turns overloaded messages, pages, and follow-ups into one clear next move.

⚡ ONE-CLICK ANALYSIS
Paste what's stuck. Get one clear move. No complexity, no menus.

📋 CONTEXT MENU
Right-click any text → "Analyze with MindReply" → See results

🎯 USE CASES
• Tense customer replies
• Overloaded email drafts
• Unclear follow-ups
• Website sections with low clarity
• Sales objections
• Contract language that needs tightening

🔐 PRIVACY
✓ No tracking
✓ No data storage
✓ HTTPS only
✓ Open-source analysis

BUILT FOR
• Sales professionals
• Customer service teams
• Founders and executives
• Anyone who replies to pressure

POWERED BY
AI behavioral analysis + commercial communication intelligence

WEBSITE
https://mind-reply.com

SUPPORT
info@mind-reply.com

screenshots.caption: Enter text and click Get Move - Receive one clear next step instantly
Right-click any text - Select Analyze with MindReply - View results

edge.name: MindReply - Pressure Relief
